violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Counter top under tortilla warmer has dried food particles and should be wiped down more frequently. -Left side freezer by the frier on the line has food particles inside on the floor and should be wiped out. -Hard shell/chips cabinet on the line needs wiped out. -Cabinet storing cups in cardboard by the drive-thru is dirty due to the cardboard boxes getting wet and breaking down. This should be cleaned out.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Disinfectant sink for the 3-sink system has an inadequate air gap. The drain reaches down pass the lip of the bell housing. This should have a gap and needs to be fixed.--Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Hot water in the women's bathroom has low pressure and needs to be fixed.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not clean or kept in good repair. -The ventilation covers in both bathrooms have debris and are in need of cleaning.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Attachments to walls and ceilings were not cleanable and/or maintained in good repair. -The air curtain in the back of the establishment has a build up of debris and in need of cleaning.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wiping cloth on prep counter near 3 tub sink. Store in sanitizer solution when not in immediate use.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Food debris in cabinets under prep line and food splatter in microwave need cleaning. Grease build-up around/on sides of fryers needs cleaning.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Box of food container lids stored on floor near office. Store a minimum of 6" off floor to protect from contamination.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Cleaning equipment stored in front of hand sink near utility sink. Maintain accessibility to encourage hand washing.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
